positive: A minimalist and abstract depiction of mountain ranges and celestial bodies, rendered in a detailed, stylized woodcut and glyphic vector art style. The composition should be symmetrical and central, featuring overlapping silhouettes of pine trees, mountains, crescent moons, and constellations. Use a limited color palette of deep indigo, burnt orange, and matte cream. The style must emphasize clean lines, sharp contrast, and perfect symmetry, resembling Japanese Ukiyo-e ink wash mixed with modern tattoo flash designs. High detail, excellent composition, perfect symmetry, ready for screen printing.
negative: blurry, photorealism, bad anatomy, mutated, extra limbs, text, watermark, logo, signature, jpeg artifacts, noisy, grain, cluttered background, low detail, poorly drawn hands
